source: preferred modern transparent Ghostface sheet, palette-reduced and refit for mobile runtime cohesion
draw_origin: center feet baseline; engine draws cell at -48,-76 with nearest-neighbor
import: RGBA PNG, transparent background, no smoothing, clamp/nearest, no mipmaps
notes: Uses the user-preferred modern sheet poses/silhouette, but refits scale, hard alpha, muted palette, and subtle dark edge pixels to reduce pasted-in look on mobile canvas.
Source modern-transparent assets remain as reference.
Attack runtime intentionally reuses the refit movement cells; the canvas renders slash arcs separately so the weak detached baked-in modern FX are not shipped.
